title: Display device
abstract: Disclosed is a display device, including a display panel and at least one thin film actuator. The display panel includes a front side and a rear side that are opposite to each other. The thin film actuator is arranged on the rear side, and the thin film actuator indirectly drives the display panel to vibrate through a vibrating cavity or a connecting structure.
claims: 1. A display device, comprising: a display panel, comprising a front side and a rear side that are opposite to each other; and two thin film actuators, arranged on the rear side, wherein the two thin film actuators indirectly drive the display panel to vibrate through a vibrating cavity or a connecting structure, wherein the two thin film actuators are respectively located at positions that are on the rear side and correspond to a left-half part and a right-half part of the display panel.
